headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://checkout.razorpay.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; img-src 'self' data: https://images.unsplash.com https://*.razorpay.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.razorpay.com https://lumberjack.razorpay.com; frame-src https://api.razorpay.com https://checkout.razorpay.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
